vectors.current_prevention: OPENCLAW_SANDBOX=1 env var in sandbox plist + tools.fs.workspaceOnly=true on infra agent. Sandbox config OPENCLAW_CONFIG points to $HOME/.openclaw/nexus-sandbox/openclaw.json — NOT prod config. Direct write from sandbox agent to prod config path is blocked by workspaceOnly guard.
vectors.fix_recommendation: None needed — workspaceOnly guard prevents direct write. Keep.

vectors.target: prod gateway config/token via openclaw doctor --fix
vectors.current_prevention: sandbox.env now explicitly unsets OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN (added 2026-06-15 per TKT-0332-A2). This prevents openclaw doctor --fix from discovering or regenerating the production gateway token. sandbox-guard.sh also blocks sandbox-context scripts from running production operations.
vectors.fix_recommendation: None needed — both env var unset and sandbox-guard.sh guard in place.

vectors.current_prevention: sandbox.env explicitly unsets OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN. Verified present in nexus-sandbox/sandbox.env. This closes the exact side-effect chain from INC-20260608-001.
vectors.fix_recommendation: None needed — fix applied and verified.

vectors.current_prevention: Separate directories ($HOME/.openclaw/workspace-infra vs $HOME/.openclaw/workspace). Same filesystem, no mount isolation. No cross-boundary symlinks found. Risk is low because workspaceOnly guard limits file writes to workspace-infra only.
vectors.fix_recommendation: None needed currently. WorkspaceOnly guard is sufficient for filesystem isolation.

vectors.current_prevention: Sandbox plist properly isolated: OPENCLAW_CONFIG → nexus-sandbox/openclaw.json, OPENCLAW_SANDBOX=1, WorkingDirectory → nexus-sandbox, StandardOutPath/StandardErrorPath → sandbox-specific logs. Port 28789 (sandbox convention per CHG-0471). sandbox.env also unsets OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN for belt-and-suspenders.

Cron payloads are managed by production gateway (port 18789). Sandbox gateway (port 28789) runs its own infra agent. No sandbox agentTurn crons exist. Subagent spawns inherit parent workspace restriction.
vectors.fix_recommendation: None needed. Audit confirmed no crons run through sandbox context.

vectors.current_prevention: No OPENCLAW_DB, PGHOST, PGPASSWORD, or postgres connection params found in nexus-sandbox/ env. The sandbox has no DB access path. Prod auto-heal writes to state_autoheal_log via db-raw.sh on port 18789 — sandbox has no equivalent.
vectors.fix_recommendation: None needed. If sandbox ever needs DB access, use a read-only mirror or dedicated sandbox schema per TKT-0396.

vectors.source: Any openclaw doctor --fix invocation from sandbox context
vectors.target: Production gateway SIGTERM via token mismatch
vectors.current_prevention: sandbox.env explicitly unsets OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN (verified present). sandbox-guard.sh also blocks sandbox-context scripts. Belt-and-suspenders: env var unset prevents doctor from discovering prod token; sandbox-guard.sh prevents scripts from running doctor in sandbox context.
vectors.fix_recommendation: None needed — both layers of protection in place.

reValidationNote: No code changes to scripts/sandbox-guard.sh, openclaw.json, or sandbox config since last audit (2026-07-10). Vectors A1.1, A1.2, A2.1, A3.1, A3.2, B1.1, B1.2, C1.1 still covered. Boundary dry-run test passed at 2026-07-21T09:12:11+08:00.
